name: Sonoma Fettuccine Alfredo
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Sonoma marinated dried tomatoes -- (1 jar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water for 5 to 8 minutes until just tender; drain well.
2. Meanwhile, heat the tomato marinara oil in a large skillet over medium heat and add the tomatoes, halved. Set aside.
3. Add 1/2 cup of the cream to the skillet with the tomatoes. Cook, stirring constantly, for about 3 minutes until slightly thickened.
4. Reduce heat to medium. Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and mix gently.
5. Stir in half a cup of cheese, half a cup of the remaining cream, and the reserved tomatoes. Lift and mix the pasta gently.
6. Repeat with the remaining cheese and cream; mix again. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Transfer the mixture to warmed individual pasta bowls or a large platter. Sprinkle with chives and nutmeg. Serve immediately.
